title: Adada Naana Lyrics in Tamil
stanzas:
adadaa naana nodiyil
nooraagi udainthen
azhage nee en
indhayam ulle o o .

velicha poongaatre
vilagi pogaathe
naan sirithaai
ingu kumaigiren

anindha udaiyellaam
vervai mazhaiyaagi
naanum nanainthaen

nijama nizhalaa

naalai kaalai unmadi
venum ena thonuthe

padarum vali

tamilStanzas:
அடடா நானா நொடியில்
நூறாகி உடைந்தேன்
அழகே நீ என்
இதயம் உள்ளே ஓ ஓ .

வெளிச்ச பூங்காற்றே
விலகி போகாதே
நான் சிறிதாய்
இங்கு குமைகிறேன்

அணிந்த உடையெல்லாம்
வேர்வை மழையாகி
நானும் நனைந்தேன்

முதலா முடிவா
முதலே நீ சொல்
நிஜமா நிழலா
நிஜமாய் நீ சொல்

இதழில் கொஞ்சம் ஓரமாய்
தேநீர் தந்தாய் நீயடி
இயல்பாய் உன்னை பார்ப்பதும்
இரக்கம் இல்லாமல் தாக்குதே

நேற்றும் இன்றும் என்பதும்
ஏனோ போனதுவே
நாளை காலை உன்மடி
வேணும் என தோணுதே
இதமாய் சுகமாய்
படரும் வலி

முதலா முடிவா
முதலே நீ சொல்
நிஜமா நிழலா
நிஜமாய் நீ சொல்

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who is the lead actor in the movie Enai Nokki Paayum Thotta?

The lead actor in the movie is Dhanush.

Who composed the music for the song Adada Naana?

The music for this song was composed by Darbuka Siva.

What is the theme of the song Adada Naana?

The song explores themes of love and emotional connection.

When was the movie Enai Nokki Paayum Thotta released?

The movie was released in the year 2019.

Who wrote the lyrics for the song Adada Naana?

The lyrics were penned by Thamizhanangu.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Adada Naana from the movie Enai Nokki Paayum Thotta, released in 2019, is a soulful melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Featuring the talented Dhanush and Megha Akash, the song is beautifully composed by Darbuka Siva with heartfelt lyrics by Thamizhanangu. It portrays the emotional depth of a romantic connection, resonating deeply with listeners. The soothing tune and evocative lyrics make it a memorable addition to Tamil cinema's musical repertoire.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Adada Naana, a mesmerizing melody from the movie Enai Nokki Paayum Thotta, captivates listeners with its heartfelt lyrics by Thamizhanangu and soulful composition by Darbuka Siva. The song beautifully portrays the emotional depth of love and longing, resonating deeply with its audience. Featuring the stellar performances of Dhanush and Megha Akash, this track is a timeless addition to Tamil cinema's musical legacy.
stanzaMeanings: Oh, I shattered into a hundred pieces in a moment; beauty, you reside within my heart.
Bright breeze, don't drift away; I smile here, yet I feel overwhelmed.
The attire I wore turned into a rain of sweat, and I too became drenched.
Is it the beginning or the end? Tell me the truth; is it real or just a shadow?
You gave a little honey-like water at the edge of your lips; naturally, seeing you stirs me without mercy.
Yesterday, today, and everything seems to have passed; tomorrow morning, I feel I need you. This path spreads with comfort and joy.
Is it the beginning or the end? Tell me the truth; is it real or just a shadow?
Oh, I shattered into a hundred pieces in a moment; beauty, you reside within my heart.
Bright breeze, don't drift away; I smile here, yet I feel overwhelmed.
The attire I wore turned into a rain of sweat, and I too became drenched.
Is it the beginning or the end? Tell me the truth; is it real or just a shadow?
